revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-2-150

A prismatic lens obtained by the rotation of an equi-angular profile about the optical axis of the lens. In such a lens, the bullseye and rings usually present a continuous convex surface towards the source.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Equi-Angular Lens}}
